source_pdf: 1. The PMI Guide to Business Analysis (2017) Vietnamese - lingvanex - Best.pdf
output_type: static HTML knowledge site packaged as ZIP
language: Vietnamese with bilingual Vietnamese-English headings and labels

content_pages.title: Nền tảng và môi trường (Foundations and Environment)
Vai trò BA và đánh giá nhu cầu A (BA Role and Needs Assessment A)
Đánh giá nhu cầu B và stakeholder A (Needs Assessment B and Stakeholder A)
Stakeholder và khơi gợi A (Stakeholder and Elicitation A)
Khơi gợi và phân tích A (Elicitation and Analysis A)
Phân tích B và truy xuất (Analysis B and Traceability)
Đánh giá giải pháp và toolkit (Solution Evaluation and Toolkit)

section_synchronization_validation.message: All non-quiz X.X sections are generated from the same source list in HTML pages and print.html.

quiz_validation.rule_applied: 10 questions/page = 5 Hard + 5 Hardest; quiz excluded from print.html.

deduplication_validation.method: Generated section content from one canonical section list; checked unique quiz stems; avoided verbatim book reproduction and used original explanatory prose. Repeated navigation labels and technical terms are intentionally excluded.
deduplication_validation.semantic_similarity_threshold: 80% target, manual rewrite pattern used for near-template phrases.

copyright_fidelity_note: Non-substitutive study companion: summary, explanation, application guidance, examples, checklists and quizzes; no long verbatim passages from the PDF.

print_validation.checked_with: Estimated from print.html word count plus compact A4 print CSS; Chromium validation was available in the initial build, then CSS was tightened to target approximately 70 pages.
print_validation.note: The print CSS uses A4, compact margins, and section page breaks. Actual browser pagination can vary slightly by browser and printer settings.
